name: Yet Another Hero Story
short_description: Yet Another Hero Story is a medieval point-and-click adventure game set in a fantasy cartoon world. The game brings back fond memories from the golden years of the genre.
detailed_description:
A noble lady has been abducted and only a hero can save her. That hero shouldn't be Martin McNish but life has an odd sense of humor sometimes.

It Is Your Task to Help Martin, Become A Hero.

Are you ready to embrace the classic charm of point-and-click adventures? Dive into the enchanting world of 'Yet Another Hero Story' with more than 50 different hand-painted environments. Everything is created in the good old and painful 2D way.

Our Design Philosophy

We have an unwavering passion for point-and-click adventures that harks back to the golden era of gaming with Sierra and Lucasarts classics. We're true gamers at heart, and creating games is our way of sharing the joy we find in the world of interactive storytelling. We cherish the nostalgic magic of old-school gaming and we hope you are too.
